title: FIR Filter Design — Output (CSD Coefficients)
description: Result produced by the FirDesign CLI. Contains quantized FIR coefficients in both numeric and CSD string form.

filter_order.description: Echo of the input filter order.

coefficients.description: FIR impulse response coefficients h[0..N-1]. The filter is symmetric: use as h or in linear-phase form.

value.description: CSD-quantized coefficient value (double). Use directly in floating-point simulation.

csd.description: Canonical Signed Digit string. Digits: '+' (+1), '-' (−1), '0' (0). Point separates integer/fractional part.

verilog.description: Synthesizable Verilog module (present only when verilog was requested in input).
